name: hud
description: A consolidated status line for the companion plugins: an animated beacon plus open tasks (+ the in-progress one), paused state, quality-attributes status, last tidy action, tokens up/down, git branch, and model — rendered read-only from existing plugin state and the statusLine payload. Run /hud:setup once to wire it into settings.json with a version-resilient command (survives updates). No hooks, no scanning, zero model-token cost.
